ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cloud_storage_services" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cloud storage service */,
  "service_name" TEXT /* Name of the cloud storage service (e.g., Google Drive, SkyDrive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cloud storage service */,
  "provider" TEXT /* The company providing the cloud storage service */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL of the cloud storage service */,
  "api_endpoint" TEXT /* API endpoint for integration */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the cloud storage service's logo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the service was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature (e.g., Size Limit, Shareable Content) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feature */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the feature */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the feature */,
  "icon_url" TEXT /* URL of the feature icon */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was added to the platform */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "service_features" (
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feature */,
  "feature_value" TEXT /* Value of the feature for the cloud storage service */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is a default feature for the service */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the feature is optional and can be enabled/disabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was added to the service */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the feature was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("service_id", "feature_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, manager, end-user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* User's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User's account status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_services" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "service_plan" TEXT /* Plan subscribed by the user (e.g., free, premium) */,
  "subscription_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's subscription started */,
  "subscription_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the user's subscription ends */,
  "is_trial" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user is on a trial plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user subscribed to the service */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the subscription was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "storage_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each storage usage record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "storage_used" REAL /* Amount of storage used by the user */,
  "storage_limit" REAL /* Storage limit for the user's plan */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the storage usage record */,
  "file_count" INTEGER /* Number of files stored */,
  "folder_count" INTEGER /* Number of folders stored */,
  "last_storage_check" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last storage usage check */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_usage_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_storage_usage_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_sharing" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file sharing record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of the file sharing record */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Email addresses of users the file was shared with */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the shared file */,
  "share_type" TEXT /* Type of share (e.g., link, direct) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the shared file (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was shared */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the share record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sharing_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_sharing_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration" (
  "collab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file collaborated on */,
  "collab_date" TEXT /* Date of the collaboration record */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* Email addresses of users who collaborated on the file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the collaborated file */,
  "collab_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "collab_status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration started */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the collaboration record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notif_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "notif_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notif_message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., storage, sharing, collaboration) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notif_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is a default setting */,
  "is_editable" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the setting is editable by the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_settings_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "integrations" (
  "integration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each integration */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "integration_name" TEXT /* Name of the integration (e.g., Google Docs) */,
  "integration_key" TEXT /* API key for the integration */,
  "integration_type" TEXT /* Type of integration (e.g., productivity, security) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the integration is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the integration was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("integration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_integrations_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "service_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cloud storage service */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date of the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log (e.g., login, file upload, file download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_service_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_id") REFERENCES cloud_storage_services ("service_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
